payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Procurements
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad procurement agenda for December 2024, requesting Board approval to award various contracts and purchase orders totaling $48.8M.

tool_args.label: MN241812 Initial Proposed Hourly Operating Rate

payload.raw_value_text: NY Waterway initially proposed an hourly rate of $846 for operating services
payload.scope: Initial proposed hourly rate for operating services on Haverstraw-Ossining and Newburgh-Beacon routes

payload.raw_value_text: MNR secured a reduced hourly rate of $834 for operating services
payload.scope: Negotiated hourly rate for operating services

payload.raw_value_text: 1.4 percent less than the initially proposed rate
payload.scope: Reduction in hourly operating rate after negotiations

payload.raw_value_text: $42 per hour for parking facility services
payload.scope: Initial proposed hourly rate for parking facility services

payload.raw_value_text: $36 for parking facility services which is 14.2 percent less than the initially proposed rate
payload.scope: Negotiated hourly rate for parking facility services

payload.raw_value_text: total cost savings of approximately 2.03 percent, or $916,412 for the base and option years
payload.scope: Total cost savings compared to original proposal for base and option years

tool_args.label: MN241812 Average Annual Operating Rate Increase

payload.raw_value_text: increase of 2.44 percent which is below the Consumer Price Index average of 3 percent over the past 10 years
payload.scope: Cost Price unit comparison of existing contract average annual operating rate to new contract rate
payload.comparison_period: Consumer Price Index average over the past 10 years

payload.description: Haverstraw-Ossining Ferry service began after a successful demonstration project and subsequent MTA Board approval
MNR Procurement issued notification of the RFP to 16 firms for ferry services
A single proposal was received from NY Waterway
Metro-North Committee meeting scheduled to review procurement actions
MTA Board meeting scheduled to approve procurement actions
Document date from footnotes on pages 9 and 10

payload.claim_text: This procurement was conducted as a joint-agency initiative to leverage the combined buying power of the Railroads. The multi-year contract assures the Railroads that BBM, as the original equipment manufacturer, will continue to maintain its tooling and manufacturing capabilities necessary to produce the parts, which are not available from other sources.
payload.subject: Contract MN249632

payload.claim_text: In early 2019, BBM acquired all of Macton's machinery, inventory, and intellectual property rights.
payload.subject: BBM Railway Equipment

payload.claim_text: None. The Railroads do not possess the resources to provide these services and parts in-house.
payload.subject: Contract MN249632

payload.claim_text: There are currently no alternatives for these services.
payload.subject: Contract MN241812

payload.claim_text: Both routes currently provide regularly scheduled commuter ferry service Monday through Friday during morning and evening peak times.
payload.subject: Haverstraw-Ossining and Newburgh-Beacon ferry routes
